_description: Face-centered thumbnail with emotional anchor. CTR pattern proven by Fern/MrBallen — faces beat objects on impression CTR.
prompt_template: Cinematic close-up archival-style portrait of {historical_figure} from {year_period}, dramatic side-light, sepia + cold teal grade, deep crushed shadows, Fern documentary aesthetic, eyes locked on viewer with subtle melancholy, weathered texture, shot on Leica M 35mm, 16:9 1280x720, clean negative space right side for text overlay, no text in image
style_notes: Risk : faces increase CTR but may anchor expectation on biography, hurting retention if video is event-centric. Test on event-with-protagonist videos only.
